reviews.comment:
Buena atención, es un lugar estratégico en viaje a Catamarca, me parece que podrían invertir un poco más! Deberían tener más servicios en el Bar, un comedor un poco mejor, tal vez solo había mucha gente por el feriado, no se cómo es el resto del año

(Translated by Google)
Good service, it's a strategic location on the way to Catamarca, but I think they could invest a little more! They should offer more services in the bar, and the dining room could be a bit nicer. Perhaps it was just busy because of the holiday; I don't know what it's like the rest of the year.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2LTdHVjNRRRAB
